case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. ANTHONY A. LEVINTOW et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-22-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINTOW, ANTHONY A.

DECLARATION MARK WALSH FILED RE: MEMORANDUM SUUPORTING COMPETENCY OF WITNESS TO TESTIFY TO THE CONTENTS OF THE PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION MARGARET PARTON FILED RE: CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
AFFIDAVIT OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVINTOW, ANTHONY A. $3,084.12 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $475.67 INTEREST, $269.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,489.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION MARK D. WALSH FILED RE: (CCP 585(D)INTEREST, CCP 1033(B)(2)NOTICE AND REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINTOW, ANTHONY A. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-01-2011
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $269.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LEVINTOW, ANTHONY A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
